fession in Luxembourg for at least 6 months already . There are no age or residence requirements for applicants for linguistic leave. The Luxemburgish language courses eligible for linguistic leave are those provided in Luxembourg or abroad by: public or private teaching establishments recognised by the public authorities and

private associations specifically approved by the Minister responsible for vocational training; ministries, administrations and public establishments. Language courses which only form a part of a complete vocational training programme or project or which are taught within the framework of special training leave for staff repr

Last update 15.09.2022 Go to online services and forms Linguistic leave is a special form of leave granted to employees of all nationalities who wish to learn Luxembourgish or to improve their knowledge of the language. Linguistic leave forms part of occupational training in Luxembourg in addition to individual training leave . Wh
